nasb.text: Everyone who hates his brother is a murderer; and you know that no murderer has eternal life abiding in him.

esv.text: Everyone who hates his brother is a murderer, and you know that no murderer has eternal life abiding in him.

cnv.text: 凡恨弟兄的，就是殺人的。你們知道，殺人的在他裡面沒有永生。

ccb.text: 恨弟兄姊妹的就是杀人的，你们知道杀人的没有永生。

csbs.text: 凡是恨自己弟兄的，就是杀人的，而你们知道：凡是杀人的，就没有永恒的生命住在他里面。
